title: Record: 1.2073 bpb • 11L gold6 • 8xH100
body:
Method
This submission uses a tuned 11-layer GPT model (train_merged_gpt_gold6.py) trained on 8×H100 under the 600-second wallclock limit.
Key components:

11 layers, model dimension 512, 8 attention heads with 4 KV heads (GQA)
Tied embeddings + bigram hash embedding
Muon optimizer with tuned momentum warmup
EMA applied to final weights
Mixed int6 quantization with per-row scales + zstd-22 compression

Trained with TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS=262144 and TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=2048.
Achieved 1.2073 bpb (post-EMA) on 8×H100.
The final submitted artifact is an int6 + zstd compressed model of approximately 15.5 MB (total submission size under 16 MB).
